message:
🌱 Add tikv: TiKV GcKeys task doesn't work when called with multiple mission (#892)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "tikv-11217-tikv-gckeys-task-doesn-t-work-when-called-with-multiple-keys-at-least",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "tikv: TiKV GcKeys task doesn't work when called with multiple keys (at least in 5.1 but I think for everything)",
+    "description": "TiKV GcKeys task doesn't work when called with multiple keys (at least in 5.1 but I think for everything). Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify tikv troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your tikv deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv -n tikv --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review tikv configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant tikv configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nkubectl get configmap -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=tikv\n```\nIn gc worker, https://github.com/tikv/tikv/blob/master/src/server/gc_worker/gc_worker.rs#L340 the GcKeys GC task when called with multiple keys tries to get the list of regions overlapping the key range for the task and then do a sorted merge of the"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for TiKV GcKeys task doesn't work when called with multiple\u2026",
+        "description": "### What problem does this PR solve?\n\nIssue Number: close #11217 \n\nProblem Summary: GcKeys never actually garbage collects key ranges due to encoding issue.\n\n### What is changed and how it works?\n\nAdd data key prefix so that GcKeys actually garbage collects keys\n\nWhat's Changed:\n\n### Related\n```yaml\n[2021/11/03 06:46:28.397 +00:00] [INFO] [region_info_accessor.rs:385] [\"gc get_regions_in_range\"] [start_key=\"[116, 128, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 255, 159, 95, 114, 128, 0, 0, 12, 81, 255, 152, 74, 144, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 250]\"] [first_region=\"Some(([122, 116, 128, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 255, 19, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 248], 53))\"] [regions_size=126845]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm TiKV GcKeys task doesn't work when called with\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv -n tikv --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n tikv --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What problem does this PR solve?\n\nIssue Number: close #11217 \n\nProblem Summary: GcKeys never actually garbage collects key ranges due to encoding issue.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[2021/11/03 06:46:28.397 +00:00] [INFO] [region_info_accessor.rs:385] [\"gc get_regions_in_range\"] [start_key=\"[116, 128, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 255, 159, 95, 114, 128, 0, 0, 12, 81, 255, 152, 74, 144, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 250]\"] [first_region=\"Some(([122, 116, 128, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 255, 19, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 248], 53))\"] [regions_size=126845]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "tikv",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "tikv"
+    ],

+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/tikv/tikv/issues/11217",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/tikv/tikv/pull/11234"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "tikv-ctl",
+      "tiup"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running TiKV cluster (standalone or deployed on Kubernetes via TiDB Operator). TiUP and tikv-ctl are the primary CLI tools for managing TiKV."
+  },
